_comment: Fallback messages for each event type. gaze.sh randomly picks one when no Claude Code session consumes the trigger within 120s. Customize these to your voice.
woke_up: Device woke up — screen is on.
binge_app: Screen time alert — extended usage detected.
You've been on this app for a while. Take a break.
Long session detected. Rest your eyes.
low_battery: Battery running low. Find a charger.
midnight_phone: It's late — consider putting the phone down.
stopped: No movement detected for a while. Everything OK?
long_silence: No activity for some time. Device may be idle.
left_chat: Left chat — now browsing other apps.
Switched away from messaging to browse.
Chat window closed, moved to another app.
Left the conversation. Will be waiting.
